title: Gregified Integrations
description: Integrating your favorite mods with GregtechCEu
body:
This mod changes the recipes for the following:

# Both Support Only

- AE2WTLib (Both Support)
- Applied Botanics (Both Support)
- Applied Energistics 2 (Both Support)
- Applied Flux (Both Support)
- Applied Mekanistics (Both Support)
- Ars Nouveau (Both Support)
- Biomes O' Plenty (Both Support)
- CC: Tweaked (Both Support)
- Chisel and Bits (Both Support)
- Productive Bees (Both Support)
- Rechiseled (Both Support)
- Rechiseled: Create (Both Support)
- Specialised Cells (Both Support)
- The Twilight Forest (Both Support)

# Only Removal Support Forever....

- Applied Cooking (Removal Support Only)

# Current Removal Support Only


- Ars Énergistique (Removal Support)
- Assembly Lines (Removal Support)
- Better Archeology (Removal Support)
- CC:C Bridge (Removal Support)
- Cooking For Blockheads (Removal Support)
- Dank Storage (Removal Support)
- FLux Network (Removal Support)
- Iron Jetpacks (Removal Support)
- Jumbo Furnace (Removal Support)
- Mekanism More Solar Panels (Removal Support)
- Mekanism Weapons (Removal Support)
- ME Requester (Removal Support)
- MineColonies (Removal Support)
- MineColonies For ComputerCraft (Removal Support)
- Multi Piston (Removal Support)
- Pipez (Removal Support)
- Refined Cooking (Removal Support)
- Refined Storage Addon (Removal Support)
- Refined Storage Infinity Booster (Removal Support)
- Refined Storage Insert Export Upgrade (Removal Support)
- Refined Storage Requestify (Removal Support)
- Universal Grid (Removal Support)
- Wireless Chargers (Removal Support)
